title: Saudi Arabia vs Spain Box Score - June 21, 2026 - The Athletic
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text: Just got home and turned this game on Fox. Commentary was about Tyler Adams and Christian Pulisic. I was amazed as neither plays for either of these teams. So I went over to Telemundo. My Spanish es muy malo, but it was clear that the main commentator was doing play-by-play and they were only discussing things related to this game. What has happened to American broadcasting? I am truly ashamed.
